rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §37.0832 governs school district bullying prevention policies. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects and share no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 37.0832. BULLYING PREVENTION POLICIES AND PROCEDURES.
_note: No conflict: proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase has no relationship to Educ. Code §37.0832 bullying prevention requirements.
